theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) customized with Yellow/Orange accents

spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px to 4px) for a sharp, edgy look

surface_strategies.header: Solid #0a0a0a or Crystal Glass (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10)
surface_strategies.product_cards: Cardless design. Image is edge-to-edge in its container, text directly below without borders or shadows. Hover effect on image (scale up 105%).
surface_strategies.admin_dashboard: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border (#262626), no shadows. Technical look.
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-yellow-400 text-black hover:bg-yellow-500 rounded-sm font-bold tracking-tight.

hero_background.description: Black and white photo of a drummer, evocative of rhythmic practice (Riyaz)
hero_background.usage: Hero section background with heavy black gradient overlay (bg-black/70 to transparent) so text remains readable.

product_tabla_tee.usage: Main product 1 - e.g., 'The Riyaz Dark Tee'

product_riyaz_tee.usage: Main product 2 - e.g., 'The Riyaz Light Tee'

category_tabla_instrument.usage: About us or 'The Inspiration' section visual

component_instructions.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid. Examples: 'add-to-cart-button', 'size-selector-m', 'checkout-submit-button'.
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react (default). Size 20px for regular buttons.
component_instructions.animation: Subtle hover states on buttons. Image zoom-in on hover for product catalog. Staggered fade-up for product lists.
component_instructions.shadcn_overrides: Override Shadcn default styles to match the dark theme and sharp edges (rounded-sm instead of rounded-md/lg). For inputs, use bg-[#171717] border-[#262626] focus-visible:ring-yellow-400.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config for Dark Mode ONLY (bg-[#0a0a0a], text-[#fafafa]). Override standard colors with the palette provided.

2. Add fonts 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts or standard imports. Use Cabinet Grotesk for all headings. Note: Keep using .js/.jsx extensions instead of .tsx where applicable based on existing config.
3. Build the Landing Page: A highly emotional hero section using the 'hero_background' image with a heavy black overlay. Headline e.g., 'THE RHYTHM OF DEDICATION'. CTA: 'Shop Riyaz Tee'.
4. Product Catalog: Cardless grid. Each item has an image (aspect-[4/5]), title (Manrope, bold), price (text-yellow-400). Hovering the image zooms it slightly.

5. Product Page (PDP): Large split layout. Left side: Image gallery. Right side: Title, Price, Size Selection (S/M/L/XL/XXL using Shadcn Radio Group or Toggle Group), Add to Cart button (Yellow, full width), and Reviews section.
6. Checkout: Integrate Razorpay (mocked or actual UI if keys not provided) for payment. Use Shadcn forms for shipping details.
7. Auth & Accounts: Login/Register pages and Order History dashboard for users.
8. Admin Panel: Dashboard layout (Archetype 4) to manage products (Add/Edit) and inventory. Dark, sterile, data-heavy, table-driven.
9. Ensure every single interactive component, form, and button has a 'data-testid' attached for automated testing.
